# ctyun_private_nat_transit_ips (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10026759/10166345



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_private_nat_transit_ips" "transit_ip" {
  nat_gateway_id = "natgw-ltxyq3aa7z"
}

output "ctyun_private_nat_transit_ips_value" {
  value = data.ctyun_private_nat_transit_ips.transit_ip
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `nat_gateway_id` (String) 要查询的私网NAT网关的ID

### Optional

- `region_id` (String) 资源池id，如果不填这默认使用provider ctyun总region_id 或者环境变量

### Read-Only

- `transit_ips` (Attributes List) 中转IP列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--transit_ips))

<a id="nestedatt--transit_ips"></a>
### Nested Schema for `transit_ips`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) 中转IP地址
- `dnat_count` (Number) 在使用此中转IP的dnat数量
- `is_default` (Boolean) 是否为默认中转地址
- `snat_count` (Number) 在使用此中转IP的snat数量
- `status` (String) 中转IP状态: running代表运行中, freeze代表已冻结, expired代表已到期
